description: Handover must document `gh issue create -R $GH_TASK_REPO` as the way to open a new task issue (replaces the old append-to-inbox.md flow)
The GH issue opened by /handover must carry --label type:handover so /pickup can filter handover issues by label
Skill must have a ## Config block pointing at brain-os.config.md so vault_path + gh_task_repo can be resolved
